commandText: SELECT 1 FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA='PI' AND TABLE_NAME='__EFMigrationsHistory';
SELECT 1 FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA='PI' AND TABLE_NAME='__EFMigrationsHistory';
ALTER TABLE `user_attendance` MODIFY COLUMN `time_late` time(6) NULL;
ALTER TABLE `user` MODIFY COLUMN `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '2026-04-19 23:05:02.573482';
ALTER TABLE `role` MODIFY COLUMN `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '2026-04-19 23:05:02.571122';
ALTER TABLE `company` MODIFY COLUMN `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '2026-04-19 23:05:02.569699';

CREATE TABLE `subscriptions` (
    `id` char(36) COLLATE ascii_general_ci NOT NULL,
    `company_id` char(36) COLLATE ascii_general_ci NOT NULL,
    `plan_name` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NOT NULL,
    `status` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NOT NULL,
    `start_date` datetime(6) NOT NULL,
    `end_date` datetime(6) NULL,
    `external_id` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NULL,
    `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '2026-04-19 23:05:02.571945',
    CONSTRAINT `PK_subscriptions` PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    CONSTRAINT `FK_subscriptions_company_company_id` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`) REFERENCES `company` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) CHARACTER SET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE `subscription_events` (
    `id` char(36) COLLATE ascii_general_ci NOT NULL,
    `subscription_id` char(36) COLLATE ascii_general_ci NOT NULL,
    `event_type` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NOT NULL,
    `payload` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NOT NULL,
    `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '2026-04-19 23:05:02.572352',
    CONSTRAINT `PK_subscription_events` PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
    CONSTRAINT `FK_subscription_events_subscriptions_subscription_id` FOREIGN KEY (`subscription_id`) REFERENCES `subscriptions` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) CHARACTER SET=utf8mb4;
ALTER TABLE `user` MODIFY COLUMN `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '2026-04-27 14:45:25.880099';
ALTER TABLE `subscriptions` MODIFY COLUMN `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '2026-04-27 14:45:25.8785';
ALTER TABLE `subscriptions` ADD `CustomerId` longtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 NULL;
ALTER TABLE `subscription_events` MODIFY COLUMN `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '2026-04-27 14:45:25.878922';
ALTER TABLE `role` MODIFY COLUMN `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '2026-04-27 14:45:25.877704';
ALTER TABLE `company` MODIFY COLUMN `created_at` datetime(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '2026-04-27 14:45:25.876209';

commandText:
SELECT `t`.`id`, `t`.`name`, `t`.`email`, `t`.`name0`, `t`.`role_id`, `t`.`is_allowed_by_pass_coord`, `t`.`is_active`, `t`.`is_confirmed`, `t`.`password`, `t`.`company_id`, `t`.`name1`, `t`.`c`, `t`.`Id0`, `t`.`id1`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`id0`, `t2`.`PunchType`, `t2`.`ShiftType`, `t2`.`PunchTime`, `t2`.`PunchDate`, `t2`.`id`, `t0`.`StartDate`, `t0`.`ShiftType`, `t0`.`StartTime`, `t0`.`EndTime`, `t0`.`c`
FROM (
    SELECT `u`.`id`, `u`.`name`, `u`.`email`, `r`.`name` AS `name0`, `u`.`role_id`, `u`.`is_allowed_by_pass_coord`, `u`.`is_active`, `u`.`is_confirmed`, `u`.`password`, `u`.`company_id`, `c`.`name` AS `name1`, (
        SELECT `u0`.`punch_type`
        FROM `user_attendance` AS `u0`
        WHERE `u`.`id` = `u0`.`employee_id`
        ORDER BY `u0`.`created_at` DESC
        LIMIT 1) AS `c`, `r`.`Id` AS `Id0`, `c`.`id` AS `id1`
    FROM `user` AS `u`
    LEFT JOIN `role` AS `r` ON `u`.`role_id` = `r`.`Id`
    INNER JOIN `company` AS `c` ON `u`.`company_id` = `c`.`id`
    WHERE `u`.`email` = @__email_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS `t`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `t1`.`StartDate`, `t1`.`ShiftType`, `t1`.`StartTime`, `t1`.`EndTime`, `t1`.`c`, `t1`.`Id`, `t1`.`id0`, `t1`.`employee_id`
    FROM (
        SELECT `u1`.`start_date` AS `StartDate`, `w`.`shift_type` AS `ShiftType`, `w`.`starter_time` AS `StartTime`, `w`.`end_time` AS `EndTime`, 1 AS `c`, `u1`.`Id`, `w`.`id` AS `id0`, `u1`.`employee_id`, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY `u1`.`employee_id` ORDER BY `u1`.`Id`, `w`.`id`) AS `row`
        FROM `user_shift` AS `u1`
        INNER JOIN `work_shift` AS `w` ON `u1`.`shift_id` = `w`.`id`
        WHERE `u1`.`is_active`
    ) AS `t1`
    WHERE `t1`.`row` <= 1
) AS `t0` ON `t`.`id` = `t0`.`employee_id`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `t3`.`PunchType`, `t3`.`ShiftType`, `t3`.`PunchTime`, `t3`.`PunchDate`, `t3`.`id`, `t3`.`employee_id`
    FROM (
        SELECT `u2`.`punch_type` AS `PunchType`, `u2`.`shift_type` AS `ShiftType`, `u2`.`punch_time` AS `PunchTime`, `u2`.`created_at` AS `PunchDate`, `u2`.`id`, `u2`.`employee_id`, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY `u2`.`employee_id` ORDER BY `u2`.`created_at` DESC) AS `row`
        FROM `user_attendance` AS `u2`
    ) AS `t3`
    WHERE `t3`.`row` <= 10
) AS `t2` ON `t`.`id` = `t2`.`employee_id`
ORDER BY `t`.`id`, `t`.`Id0`, `t`.`id1`, `t0`.`Id`, `t0`.`id0`, `t2`.`employee_id`, `t2`.`PunchDate` DESC

commandText:
SELECT `w`.`id` AS `Id`, `w`.`shift_type` AS `ShiftType`, `w`.`starter_time` AS `StartTime`, `w`.`end_time` AS `EndTime`, `w`.`tolerance_minutes` AS `ToleranceMinutes`
FROM `work_shift` AS `w`
WHERE `w`.`company_id` = @__companyId_0
